sources.title: ReEvo: Large Language Models as Hyper-Heuristics with Reflective Evolution

verified_mechanism.short_term_reflection: compare a worse and better parent before crossover
verified_mechanism.long_term_reflection: compress prior long-term memory with new short reflections
verified_mechanism.crossover_input: worse code, better code, and short reflection
verified_mechanism.mutation_input: elitist code and accumulated long-term reflection

local_mapping.label: ReEvo-inspired reflection memory
preserved_principles: parent comparison must be grounded in development feedback
memory is a compressed search hint rather than evaluation evidence
local_mapping.omitted_component: independent short-term and long-term reflector LLM calls
local_mapping.causal_question: Does reflection-derived memory reduce single-expert collapse at the same generator budget?

next_action: run only after explicit approval of six additional LLM runs
